note: per canonical phrase -> template hard negatives (direction-flip / verb-swap / object-swap / same-task-other-step)

approach the black bowl: move away from the black bowl
grasp the black bowl: place the black bowl on the plate
move the black bowl backward: place the black bowl on the plate
move the black bowl forward: place the black bowl on the plate
move the black bowl left: place the black bowl on the plate
move the black bowl right: move the top drawer of the wooden cabinet right
place the black bowl on the plate
place the black bowl on the plate: pick up the black bowl from the plate
place the cookie box on the plate
release the black bowl: close the gripper on the black bowl
release the top drawer of the wooden cabinet
